✓ Saved!

Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — OpenRouter, LiteLLM, Ollama, Jan, or your own server. The URL must accept POST /v1/chat/completions with a standard messages array.

🪞 My Personas

Create up to 10 personas — switch between them any time. The active persona is what the AI sees in all your chats.

The default is pre-selected when you start a new chat.
